segments.text: If a man desire the office of a bishop, he desireth a good work.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: A bishop then must be blameless, the husband of one wife, vigilant, sober, of good behaviour, given to hospitality, apt to teach;
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Not given to wine, no striker, not greedy of filthy lucre; but patient, not a brawler, not covetous;
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: One that ruleth well his own house, having his children in subjection with all gravity;
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For if a man know not how to rule his own house, how shall he take care of the church of God?
Not a novice, lest being lifted up with pride he fall into the condemnation of the devil.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Moreover he must have a good report of them which are without; lest he fall into reproach and the snare of the devil.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Likewise must the deacons be grave, not doubletongued, not given to much wine, not greedy of filthy lucre;
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Holding the mystery of the faith in a pure conscience.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And let these also first be proved; then let them use the office of a deacon, being found blameless.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Even so must their wives be grave, not slanderers, sober, faithful in all things.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Let the deacons be the husbands of one wife, ruling their children and their own houses well.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For they that have used the office of a deacon well purchase to themselves a good degree, and great boldness in the faith which is in Christ Jesus.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: These things write I unto thee, hoping to come unto thee shortly:
But if I tarry long, that thou mayest know how thou oughtest to behave thyself in the house of God, which is the church of the living God, the pillar and ground of the truth.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: God was manifest in the flesh, justified in the Spirit, seen of angels, preached unto the Gentiles, believed on in the world, received up into glory.
segments.speaker: God
